ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "daynum" INTEGER /* Day number of the season the game was played on */,
  "wteam" INTEGER /* Winning team identifier */,
  "wscore" INTEGER /* Winning team's score */,
  "lteam" INTEGER /* Losing team identifier */,
  "lscore" INTEGER /* Losing team's score */,
  "wloc" TEXT /* Location of the game (Home/Away/Neutral) */,
  "numot" INTEGER /* Number of overtimes played */,
  "slot" TEXT /* Slot indicating time of the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date on which the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcasted the game */,
  "home_team_score_q1" INTEGER /* Home team score at the end of the first quarter */,
  "home_team_score_q2" INTEGER /* Home team score at the end of the second quarter */,
  "home_team_score_q3" INTEGER /* Home team score at the end of the third quarter */,
  "home_team_score_q4" INTEGER /* Home team score at the end of the fourth quarter */,
  "away_team_score_q1" INTEGER /* Away team score at the end of the first quarter */,
  "away_team_score_q2" INTEGER /* Away team score at the end of the second quarter */,
  "away_team_score_q3" INTEGER /* Away team score at the end of the third quarter */,
  "away_team_score_q4" INTEGER /* Away team score at the end of the fourth quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam FOREIGN KEY ("lteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam FOREIGN KEY ("wteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Guard) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "contract_expiration_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stats pertain to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus statistic */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "contract_expiration_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's current contract expires */,
  "coaching_record_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the coach's career */,
  "coaching_record_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the coach's career */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game analyzed in the report */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., Performance, Strategy) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or insights generated from the analysis */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the report is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
